name: Kindergarten Financial Literacy & Entrepreneurship — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making through a close look at needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making through a guided practice with needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making through a small creation or demonstration about needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making.

units.title: Wonder and notice: needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making

activities.title: A close look at needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in needs and wants, saving, sharing, and simple choice-making.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
